proposed_automation_improvements_for_aut: Auto-transcript ingestion + concept tagging pipeline for every new video/research source
Session gating checklist before enabling any strategy execution module
Agent quality gate requiring evidence links for each proposed change
Unified risk telemetry board (drawdown, latency, failover, execution drift)
Prompt-template library with versioning and rollback for research agents
ResearchCard schema validation + duplicate detection before storage
Weekly concept drift detector to flag stale assumptions in automation logic
Execution incident postmortem generator from logs + journal events
Automated content-to-product pipeline (notes -> assets -> landing snippets)
Human approval queue for high-impact automation changes
monetization_angles_ai_automation: AI automation audit service for trading operators (process-focused)
Subscription knowledge base of vetted automation playbooks
Template packs for research workflow orchestration
Paid cohort on building safe AI-assisted trading operations
Managed dashboard setup for risk/ops observability
Consulting retainers for execution reliability improvements
Creator partnership program for automation tooling integrations
Compliance-friendly documentation generator for algo ops
trading_relevant_concept_hooks: Risk limit enforcement as non-optional pre-trade check
Execution quality tracking (slippage/latency) as continuous signal
Data quality scoring prior to model/research use
Kill-switch design for automation failure scenarios
Hypothesis-driven iteration loops instead of ad-hoc changes
Separation of research concepts from live deployment claims
Feedback loop from outcomes into process improvements
next_experiments_suggestions_not_execute: Pilot daily ingestion of one new creator feed into ResearchCard pipeline
Test transcript quality thresholds and fallback labeling policy
Run a one-week manual-vs-automated concept tagging comparison
Prototype risk-gate checklist embedded in AutoQuant session startup
Build a small telemetry dashboard for execution + risk events
Trial two monetization offers with lightweight landing copy tests
Evaluate agent prompt versioning impact on output consistency
Design failure taxonomy for transcript/process pipeline errors
Create rubric for selecting automation ideas by effort vs reliability gain
Draft operator SOP for approving/rejecting automation updates
